prompt: Show me the character counts for all the .md files under skills/char-counter/

assertions.text: SKILL.md appears in the output with character counts
assertions.description: SKILL.md is the primary .md file under skills/char-counter/

assertions.text: The output includes a total or summary row aggregating across all files
assertions.description: Skill specifies: for multiple files, report each on its own line with a total row

assertions.text: Each file entry includes at least a character count
assertions.description: Each file should have at least the total character count reported
